components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: aead
components.description: Traits for Authenticated Encryption with Associated Data (AEAD) algorithms, such as AES-GCM as ChaCha20Poly1305, which provide a high-level API

components.name: base64
components.description: encodes and decodes base64 as bytes or utf8

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: block-buffer
components.description: Buffer type for block processing of data

components.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
components.name: cfg-if
components.description: A macro to ergonomically define an item depending on a large number of #[cfg] parameters. Structured like an if-else chain, the first matching branch is the item that gets emitted.

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: chacha20
components.description: The ChaCha20 stream cipher (RFC 8439) implemented in pure Rust using traits from the RustCrypto `cipher` crate, with optional architecture-specific hardware acceleration (AVX2, SSE2). Additionally provides the ChaCha8, ChaCha12, XChaCha20, XChaCha12 and XChaCha8 stream ciphers, and also optional rand_core-compatible RNGs based on those ciphers.

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: chacha20poly1305
components.description: Pure Rust implementation of the ChaCha20Poly1305 Authenticated Encryption with Additional Data Cipher (RFC 8439) with optional architecture-specific hardware acceleration. Also contains implementations of the XChaCha20Poly1305 extended nonce variant of ChaCha20Poly1305, and the reduced-round ChaCha8Poly1305 and ChaCha12Poly1305 lightweight variants.

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: cipher
components.description: Traits for describing block ciphers and stream ciphers

components.author: RustCrypto Developers
components.name: cpufeatures
components.description: Lightweight runtime CPU feature detection for aarch64, loongarch64, and x86/x86_64 targets,  with no_std support and support for mobile targets including Android and iOS

components.author: The RustCrypto Project Developers
components.name: zeroize
components.description: Securely clear secrets from memory with a simple trait built on stable Rust primitives which guarantee memory is zeroed using an operation will not be 'optimized away' by the compiler. Uses a portable pure Rust implementation that works everywhere, even WASM!

components.description: Custom derive support for zeroize
